title: alisma plantago-aquatica var. triviale
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica var. triviale, also known as the narrow-leaved water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the Alismataceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica var. triviale include its ability to relieve edema, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of kidney and urinary tract disorders. Alisma plantago-aquatica var. triviale is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
